name: Robomotion Official Skills
description: Curated skills for Robomotion LLM Agents

skills.name: claude-ai
skills.description: Generate text, summarize, translate, or analyze content via the `robomotion claude` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: openai
skills.description: Generate text, images, embeddings, or audio via the `robomotion openai` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: gemini-ai
skills.description: Generate text or analyze images via the `robomotion googlegemini` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: pdf
skills.description: Create, merge, split, or extract text from PDF files via the `robomotion pdfprocessor` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: google-docs
skills.description: Create, read, or update Google Docs via the `robomotion googledocs` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: ocr-extraction
skills.description: Extract text from images or scanned documents via the `robomotion googlevision` or `robomotion googledocumentai` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: s3-storage
skills.description: Upload, download, list, or manage files in S3 buckets via the `robomotion amazons3` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: google-drive
skills.description: Upload, download, list, or manage files in Google Drive via the `robomotion googledrive` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: postgresql
skills.description: Query or manage a PostgreSQL database via the `robomotion postgresql` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: mongodb
skills.description: Query, insert, or manage documents in MongoDB via the `robomotion mongodb` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: clickhouse
skills.description: Query or insert data into ClickHouse via the `robomotion clickhouse` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: gmail
skills.description: Send, read, or search emails via the `robomotion gmail` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: slack
skills.description: Send messages or manage channels via the `robomotion slack` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: discord-bot
skills.description: Send messages or manage a Discord server via the `robomotion discordbot` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: telegram
skills.description: Send messages or interact with Telegram chats via the `robomotion telegrambot` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: hubspot-crm
skills.description: Manage contacts, deals, or companies via the `robomotion hubspot` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: apollo
skills.description: Search for leads or enrich contacts via the `robomotion apollo` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: jira
skills.description: Create, update, or search issues via the `robomotion jira` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: notion
skills.description: Create, read, or search Notion pages and databases via the `robomotion notion` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: web-scraper
skills.description: Scrape or extract data from web pages via the `robomotion domparser` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: apify
skills.description: Run Apify actors for web scraping or data extraction via the `robomotion apify` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: google-sheets
skills.description: Read, write, or manage data in Google Sheets via the `robomotion googlesheets` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: stripe-payments
skills.description: Manage payments, customers, or subscriptions via the `robomotion stripe` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: cloudflare
skills.description: Manage DNS records, zones, or Workers via the `robomotion cloudflare` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion

skills.name: whatsapp
skills.description: Send messages or media via the WhatsApp Business API using the `robomotion whatsapp` CLI.
skills.author: robomotion
